ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state" TEXT /* Name of the state (e.g., Central Equatoria) */,
  "pcode1" INTEGER /* Primary code for the county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "pcode2" INTEGER /* Secondary code for the county */,
  "geo_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the county */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_baseline" (
  "baseline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each baseline record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the baseline data pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the baseline data */,
  "baseline_population" REAL /* Total baseline population */,
  "accuracy_margin" REAL /* Margin of error in the baseline population data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for this baseline data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("baseline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_baseline_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age distribution record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the distribution data pertains to */,
  "children_under_18" REAL /* Number of children under 18 years */,
  "male_children_under_5" REAL /* Number of male children under 5 years */,
  "female_children_under_5" REAL /* Number of female children under 5 years */,
  "male_children_5_to_17" REAL /* Number of male children aged 5 to 17 years */,
  "female_children_5_to_17" REAL /* Number of female children aged 5 to 17 years */,
  "male_adults_18_60" REAL /* Number of male adults aged 18 to 60 years */,
  "female_adults_18_60" REAL /* Number of female adults aged 18 to 60 years */,
  "male_adults_over_60" REAL /* Number of male adults aged over 60 years */,
  "female_adults_over_60" REAL /* Number of female adults aged over 60 years */,
  "children_under_18_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of children under 18 years in the total population */,
  "adults_18_to_60_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of adults aged 18 to 60 years in the total population */,
  "adults_over_60_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of adults aged over 60 years in the total population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_distribution_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health service */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the service is located */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the health service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of health service (e.g., clinic, hospital) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the health service */,
  "geo_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the health service */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the health service (number of patients) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_services_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_growth" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the growth data pertains to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the projected data */,
  "projected_population" REAL /* Projected population for that year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_growth_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the report pertains to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the detailed report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., population growth, age distribution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_reports_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county data accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_requested" TEXT /* Description of the data requested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions from the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User's rating of the system (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., governmental, NGO) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "reliability" REAL /* Reliability of the data source (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_lead" TEXT /* Lead individual or organization for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_projects_project_lead FOREIGN KEY ("project_lead") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the participant is part of */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant in the project */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_participants_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES population_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gis_data" (
  "gis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GIS entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the GIS data pertains to */,
  "boundary_data" TEXT /* Boundary data of the county in GIS format */,
  "gis_file" TEXT /* File path to the GIS data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gis_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
